description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named debian-build that triggers on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository with recursive submodules, then perform a series of steps to build a Debian package: check the libobs revision, install a frontend header, create a tarball, set up the Debian directory, install build dependencies, build the package with debuild, and finally upload the resulting .deb artifact if the build succeeds.
